arabic: وعنها قالت‏:‏ خرج رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ذات غداة، وعليه مرط مرحل من شعر أسود‏.‏‏‏((رواه مسلم))‏

english.narrator: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported:
english.text: One morning the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) went out wearing a black blanket made of a camel or sheep's black hair with patterns of camel's bags upon it..
